event: Town square with fountain in Adrianople (Edirne)
description: A hand-colored engraving depicting a courtyard or town square in an Ottoman city. Low white buildings with arched doorways surround the space. A domed structure and a minaret are visible in the background. Tall cypress trees rise above the rooftops. Groups of figures in Ottoman-era clothing gather in the square, some seated, some walking. The scene is peaceful and sun-drenched, with soft pastel coloring typical of 19th-century topographic prints. The caption reads 'The Square of the Fountain, Adrianople.'

_meta.title: The Square of the Fountain, Adrianople (after Leitch)
